prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年吉林省理科/物理类最低位次分别为 2910→3067→→3581→2104，呈先降后升的 V 型走势；2024 年因吉林省首年新高考改革，位次后移至 3581，2025 年大幅前移至 2104，近两年波动幅度较大，2025 年基准约 2104 名；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划 2021 年 93 人、2022 年 97 人、2024 年 122 人、2025 年 103 人；2026 年计划 103 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校，哈尔滨工业大学（威海）共享校本部声誉；软科中国大学排名中哈尔滨工业大学 2026 年位列第 12 名，近年排名稳中有升（2021 年第 11→2026 年第 12），学校层次处于全国顶尖梯队；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情冲击；抖音学校热度总排名第 10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映考生关注度较高，可能加剧报考竞争。投档异常记录中未见该校明显断档信号；哈工大校本部第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上学科达 17 个，包括力学 A+、机械工程 A+、材料科学与工程 A+、环境科学与工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、软件工程 A 等，工科实力突出；威海校区招生专业覆盖计算机类、电子信息、机器人工程、软件工程等热门方向，与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在 2024 年高考周期持续高热推荐，与该校招生专业高度契合，有利于吸引高分考生；吉林省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 110868 人，较 2025 年（111492 人）基本持平，物理类考生规模约 80000 人，竞争环境稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移后已处于近年高位、2026 年招生计划持平、考生总数稳定、学校声誉中性偏正面且抖音高热等因素，预计 2026 年位次在 2025 年基准 2104 名基础上竞争略有加剧，位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约 2074 名，区间 1825–2323 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）/工科试验班（未来信息）（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全等）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）（机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程（卓越优才计划）
- 工科试验班（智能制造卓越优才计划）（机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等）
- 工科试验班（理工交叉卓越优才计划）（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（未来智造卓越优才计划）（含储能科学与工程、船舶与海洋工程等）
- 经济管理试验班（国际经济与贸易、工商管理、会计学）（2021-2022年招生，近年未明确列出）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 1825–2323 名内，建议以二档卓越优才计划为主力填报，一档未来信息/拔尖班可冲刺，三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<1825）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。该校工科实力突出，计算机、机器人、软件等方向与当前社会高热专业高度匹配，值得优先考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Jilin Province science/physics category were 2910→3067→→3581→2104, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform in Jilin Province, the ranking shifted back to 3581, and in 2025 it moved significantly forward to 2104, with large fluctuations in the past two years, and the 2025 baseline is approximately 2104; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province physics category was 93 in 2021, 97 in 2022, 122 in 2024, and 103 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 103, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university, Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) shares the reputation of the main campus; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, Harbin Institute of Technology ranked 12th in 2026, with a stable and slightly rising ranking in recent years (11th in 2021→12th in 2026), placing the school at the top tier nationally; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion impact; the university's overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 10th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high candidate attention, which may intensify application competition. No obvious gap signals were found in the university's admission anomaly records; the main campus of HIT has 17 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, etc., with outstanding engineering strength; the Weihai campus offers majors covering computer science, electronic information, robotics engineering, software engineering, and other popular directions, highly matching the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, etc., have been consistently highly recommended in the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, which helps attract high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province general college entrance examination is approximately 110,868, basically unchanged from 2025 (111,492), with about 80,000 physics category candidates, indicating a stable competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has significantly moved forward to a recent high, the 2026 enrollment plan is unchanged, the total number of candidates is stable, the school's reputation is neutral to slightly positive, and the high popularity on Douyin, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will see slightly intensified competition based on the 2025 baseline of 2104, with a slight forward movement; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2074, with a range of 1825–2323.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Advanced Technology Leading Class)/Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class) (Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design and Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Software Engineering (Excellent Talent Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program) (Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design and Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science and Engineering Cross Excellent Talent Program) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program) (including Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, etc.)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (International Economics and Trade, Business Administration, Accounting) (enrolled from 2021-2022, not explicitly listed in recent years)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1825–2323, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 Excellent Talent Programs, with Tier 1 Future Information/Top Classes as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1825), focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors. The university has outstanding engineering strength, with majors such as computer science, robotics, and software engineering highly matching current socially popular fields, making it a priority choice.
